name: Apple Cinnamon Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple; peel, core, and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the first five ingredients until blended.
2. Add the next three ingredients and beat until blended.
3. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 10-inch springform pan, arranging apples decoratively on top.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon-sugar evenly over the top of the cake.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 35-40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool in the pan. When completely cool, remove from the pan and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon sifted powdered sugar.
